overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a dystopian industrial waterfront district. The player moves from a foggy dock area through debris-filled alleys and under massive metal infrastructure, with neon holographic advertisements illuminating the hazy atmosphere.

events.description: turns left away from waterfront into narrow industrial alley with wrecked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the foggy waterfront promenade beside metal railings, with industrial buildings visible across the water

entered.detail: metal safety barrier along the water's edge with reflective surfaces
large industrial buildings with illuminated windows across the foggy water
cluster of glowing blue and white holographic advertisements floating above the distant buildings
large teal-colored industrial container or barrier with weathered surface
abandoned damaged car with broken windows and rusted body
concrete wall covered in large white and red graffiti art including skull imagery

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy industrial waterfront at night, with the camera moving along a concrete promenade beside metal railings. Across the water, an industrial complex glows with lights and holographic billboards. The player approaches and enters a narrow alley marked by a teal container structure and a wrecked sedan, with graffiti-covered walls becoming visible.

events.description: exits the narrow alley into a wide open industrial plaza with overhead metal framework

agents.ego_description: navigating through a debris-filled industrial alley, passing wrecked cars and dumpsters

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpster with rusted edges
tall concrete industrial building with minimal lighting
large illuminated billboard displaying political advertisement with 'VOTE' text
massive steel girder structure spanning overhead with red warning lights

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow industrial alley flanked by graffiti-covered concrete walls and abandoned vehicles. The space is cluttered with debris and dumpsters. As the player progresses, a massive metal overhead framework becomes visible ahead, marking the transition to a more open industrial plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial plaza with overhead transit framework

events.description: passing under the metal framework causes shifting shadows from overhead red lights

agents.ego_description: crossing a vast industrial plaza beneath massive steel girders, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the distant fog

entered.detail: row of orange and white striped concrete barriers lining the right side
tall building covered in bright neon holographic advertisements with blue and red colors
foggy silhouette of high-rise buildings with scattered lights
tall poles with bright white lights illuminating the path
tall industrial fence made of corrugated metal sheets

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast industrial plaza dominated by massive steel overhead frameworks with red warning lights. The player walks along an asphalt path lined with orange concrete barriers on the right and corrugated metal fencing on the left. In the distance, a neon-lit skyscraper covered in holographic advertisements pierces the fog, while the metal framework creates shifting shadows overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial access road with security gate

events.description: pedestrians become visible walking ahead in the distance
approaching the large metal gate structure at the end of the industrial road

agents.ego_description: approaching a security gate structure with several pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera toward the gate structure ahead

entered.detail: large industrial gate with horizontal beams and red warning lights on top
concrete barriers with red and white horizontal stripes

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a long industrial access road with the player approaching a large metal gate structure in the distance. Several pedestrians are now visible walking ahead in the same direction. The road is flanked by corrugated metal fencing and red-white barriers, with the massive gate structure growing larger as the player advances through the foggy, neon-lit environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy industrial waterfront into a vast, neon-lit industrial plaza and access road. It begins along a concrete promenade beside metal railings, moving past glowing holographic billboards across the water before turning into a narrow alley marked by a teal container and a wrecked sedan. As the camera progresses through this debris-cluttered corridor of graffiti-covered walls, the space gradually opens up beneath a massive metal overhead framework. The scene then expands into a wide plaza dominated by steel structures and red warning lights, where the path is lined with orange concrete barriers and a distant, holographic skyscraper pierces the haze. Finally, the camera advances down a long industrial access road flanked by corrugated fencing, following other pedestrians toward a looming metal gate structure in the foggy distance.
